text.title: Trend Analysis Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Trend analysis Q2 2026: on-device LLM
example.note: Candidates: on-device LLM, agent-as-product, AI-native CRM, sustainability badges. On-device LLM signals: search 78, papers 62, funding 71, GitHub stars 85, social 64; composite 72/100. Decay curve Q+1 0.95, Q+2 0.90, Q+3 0.85, Q+4 0.80 -> slope -5%/q -> structural. Other trends scored similarly; report emitted with all signals cited (Google Trends, Crossref, Crunchbase, GitHub, Reddit Pushshift).
